name: Corpus
summary: The Corpus are a profit-driven techno-corporation known for shields, robotics, and ranged pressure.
description: Major hostile faction centered around trade, advanced technology, proxies, and energy-based warfare.

recommendedStatusPlan: Break shields fast, then pressure health directly with toxin when possible.
Bring answers to Nullifier bubbles and proxy-heavy rooms.
cautions: Shield-focused enemies can waste slow ramp builds.

notes: Corpus matchup advice should distinguish between humanoid shield users and robotic proxies.
